verification_note: PDF-first audit from Santhanam Vol 1 pp.160-169. 4 gaps found: 3 in v.10-13 (Saturn/Mars spouse character, Venus-Mars sexual, Venus-Saturn sexual), 1 in v.19-21 (3-wives and many-wives conditions not separately encoded).

claims.claim: 7th lord in own sign or exaltation -> full happiness through wife
7th lord in 6th/8th/12th -> wife will be sickly
Venus in 7th -> native exceedingly libidinous; Venus joining malefic -> loss of wife
7th lord strong in kendra + conjunct/aspected by benefic -> native wealthy, honourable, happy, fortunate
7th lord in Saturn/Venus sign aspected by benefic or in exaltation -> many wives
Sun in 7th -> befriend barren females
Mars in 7th -> associate with marriageable girls
Mercury in 7th -> associate with mean females/traders' community
Physical features of spouse per planet in 7th: Mars=attractive, Saturn=sick, Jupiter=prominent, Venus=excellent
Malefics in 12th/7th + decreasing Moon in 5th -> spouse controlled by others, inimical to race/family
7th house occupied or owned by Saturn/Mars -> spouse is harlot or attached to other men illegally
claims.gap_note: Distinct condition from BPHS1825 (Saturn/Mars in 7th vs malefics in 12th). Stated in verse text, not just commentary.

claims.claim: Venus in Navamsa/Rasi of Mars or aspect/conjunct Mars -> native indulges in unusual sexual gratification from female
claims.gap_note: Venus-Mars condition produces distinct prediction about native's sexual behaviour. Stated in verse text.

claims.claim: Venus related to Saturn (instead of Mars) -> native will have ugly relations with another male
claims.gap_note: Venus-Saturn variant produces entirely different prediction direction from Venus-Mars. Stated in verse text.

claims.claim: 7th lord exalted + 7th with benefic + strong ascendant lord -> spouse with seven principal virtues, sons and grandsons
7th house/lord conjunct malefic + bereft of strength -> wife will incur evils
7th lord in dusthana + devoid of strength / in fall -> wife destroyed (early death)
Moon in 7th + 7th lord in 12th + Venus weak -> not endowed with marital happiness
7th lord in fall or malefic sign + 7th Navamsa = eunuch planet -> two wives
Mars+Venus in 7th OR Saturn in 7th + ascendant lord in 8th -> three wives
claims.gap_note: Distinct conditions (Mars+Venus or Saturn+asc lord) producing distinct outcome (3 vs 2 wives). Bundled into BPHS1828 description but conditions not captured.

claims.claim: Venus in dual sign + lord in exaltation + 7th lord strong -> many wives
claims.gap_note: Distinct conditions from 2-wives and 3-wives. Bundled into BPHS1828 description but not separately encoded.

claims.claim: 7th lord in benefic's house + Venus exalted/own sign -> marriage at age 5/9
Sun in 7th + dispositor conjunct Venus -> marriage at age 7/11
Venus in 2nd + 7th lord in 11th -> marriage at age 10/16
Venus in angle + ascendant lord in Cap/Aqu -> marriage at age 11
Venus in angle + Saturn in 7th from Venus -> marriage at age 12/19
Venus in 7th from Moon + Saturn in 7th from Venus -> marriage at age 18
2nd lord in 11th + ascendant lord in 10th -> marriage at age 15
Exchange of 2nd and 11th lords -> marriage at age 13
Venus in 7th from 8th + dispositor conjunct Mars -> marriage at age 22/27
7th lord in 12th + natal ascendant lord in 7th Navamsa -> marriage at age 23/26
8th lord in 7th + Venus in Navamsa ascendant -> marriage at age 25/33
Venus in 9th from 5th + Rahu in one of said houses -> marriage at age 31/33
Venus in ascendant + 7th lord in 7th -> marriage at age 30/27
7th lord in fall + Venus in 8th -> loss of wife at age 18/33
7th lord in 8th + 12th lord in 7th -> loss of wife at age 19
Rahu in 2nd + Mars in 7th -> wife dies within 3 days of marriage (snake bite)
Venus in 8th + dispositor in Saturn sign -> loss of wife at age 17/21
Ascendant lord debilitated + 2nd lord in 8th -> loss of wife at age 13
Moon in 7th from Venus + Mercury in 7th from Moon + 8th lord in 5th -> three marriages (10th, 22nd, 33rd year)
Mars in 6th + Rahu in 7th + Saturn in 8th -> wife will not live long
